data.name: Dungeon Crawler
data.oracle_text:
This creature enters tapped.
Whenever you complete a dungeon, you may return this card from your graveyard to your hand.
data.flavor_text:
"I think of it as giving them another chance to achieve their potential."
—Nestus Wrasse, necromancer

data.name: Forsworn Paladin
data.oracle_text:
Menace
{1}{B}, {T}, Pay 1 life: Create a Treasure token.
{2}{B}: Target creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. If mana from a Treasure was spent to activate this ability, that creature also gains deathtouch until end of turn.

data.name: Goblin Javelineer
data.oracle_text:
Haste
Whenever this creature becomes blocked, it deals 1 damage to target creature blocking it.
data.flavor_text: Hate gets you only so far. A pointy stick can close the rest of the distance.

data.name: Minion of the Mighty
data.oracle_text:
Menace
Pack tactics — Whenever this creature attacks, if you attacked with creatures with total power 6 or greater this combat, you may put a Dragon creature card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped and attacking.

data.name: Monk of the Open Hand
data.oracle_text: Flurry of Blows — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
data.flavor_text: His mind is a tranquil meadow, his fists a raging storm.

data.name: Neverwinter Dryad
data.oracle_text: {2}, Sacrifice this creature: Search your library for a basic Forest card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text: Its life force entwined with its tree, a dryad is an elusive and solitary being that wishes only to be left alone.

data.name: Ochre Jelly
data.oracle_text:
Trample
This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it.
Split — When this creature dies, if it had two or more +1/+1 counters on it, create a token that's a copy of it at the beginning of the next end step. The token enters with half that many +1/+1 counters on it, rounded down.

data.name: Ranger's Hawk
data.oracle_text:
Flying
{3}, {T}, Tap another untapped creature you control: Venture into the dungeon. Activate only as a sorcery. (Enter the first room or advance to the next room.)
data.flavor_text: Swift eyes to scout the way ahead.

data.name: Secret Door
data.oracle_text:
Defender
{4}{U}: Venture into the dungeon. Activate only as a sorcery. (Enter the first room or advance to the next room.)
data.flavor_text: The way opened before him, and the dust of centuries stirred in the air.

data.name: Shambling Ghast
data.oracle_text:
When this creature dies, choose one —
• Target creature an opponent controls gets -1/-1 until end of turn.
• Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

data.name: Silver Raven
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
data.flavor_text: Wings take flight on whispered wind.

data.name: Arcane Investigator
data.oracle_text:
Search the Room — {5}{U}: Roll a d20.
1—9 | Draw a card.
10—20 | Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

data.name: Armory Veteran
data.oracle_text: As long as this creature is equipped, it has menace. (It can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
data.flavor_text: "This one is for goblins, this one is for owlbears, this one is for toast, this one is for . . ."

data.name: Battle Cry Goblin
data.oracle_text:
{1}{R}: Goblins you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.
Pack tactics — Whenever this creature attacks, if you attacked with creatures with total power 6 or greater this combat, create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token that's tapped and attacking.

data.name: Brazen Dwarf
data.oracle_text: Whenever you roll one or more dice, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.
data.flavor_text: "My grandmother saved the life of a brass dragon, and in return she was given a glimpse of the fire in its heart—a glimpse she passed down to me."

data.name: Dawnbringer Cleric
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, choose one —
• Cure Wounds — You gain 2 life.
• Dispel Magic — Destroy target enchantment.
• Gentle Repose — Exile target card from a graveyard.

data.name: Dragon's Disciple
data.oracle_text:
As this creature enters, you may reveal a Dragon card from your hand. If you do or if you control a Dragon, this creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it.
Dragons you control have ward {1}. (Whenever a Dragon you control becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.)

data.name: Dwarfhold Champion
data.oracle_text: As long as this creature is equipped, it gets +0/+2.
data.flavor_text: Courage is neither a shield nor an axe, but the will to wield both in defense of the innocent.

data.name: Flumph
data.oracle_text:
Defender, flying
Whenever this creature is dealt damage, you and target opponent each draw a card.
data.flavor_text: Flumphs siphon thoughts and energy from evil aberrations, and are often eager to share the dark knowledge they obtain with friendly adventurers.

data.name: Gnoll Hunter
data.oracle_text: Pack tactics — Whenever this creature attacks, if you attacked with creatures with total power 6 or greater this combat, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
data.flavor_text: Yipping and cackling, the hunters tore through the village, leaving nothing but snapped bones and burning homes in their wake.

data.name: Gretchen Titchwillow
data.oracle_text: {2}{G}{U}: Draw a card. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.
data.flavor_text: "Plant what you wish to see grow. Listen for the stories you want to hear told."

data.name: Grim Wanderer
data.oracle_text:
Flash
Tragic Backstory — Cast this spell only if a creature died this turn.
data.flavor_text: There is a stillness that walks with him, the quiet that follows great tragedy, when even the mourners are too exhausted to weep.

data.name: Guild Thief
data.oracle_text:
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.
Cunning Action — {3}{U}: This creature can't be blocked this turn.
data.flavor_text: She puts some coin in the Guild's pocket and sends a message at the same time.

data.name: Hired Hexblade
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, if mana from a Treasure was spent to cast it, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.
data.flavor_text: "I'll take care of it. You just be sure to hold up your end of the deal."

data.name: Hoard Robber
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
data.flavor_text: "And to think, a year ago I was picking pockets in Waterdeep."

data.name: Hobgoblin Captain
data.oracle_text: Pack tactics — Whenever this creature attacks, if you attacked with creatures with total power 6 or greater this combat, this creature gains first strike until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Hobgoblins do not fear death, for those who fall in battle have gained glory eternal.

data.name: Ingenious Smith
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal an artifact card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
Whenever one or more artifacts you control enter, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn.

data.name: Intrepid Outlander
data.oracle_text:
Reach
Pack tactics — Whenever this creature attacks, if you attacked with creatures with total power 6 or greater this combat, venture into the dungeon. (Enter the first room or advance to the next room.)

data.name: Kalain, Reclusive Painter
data.oracle_text:
When Kalain enters, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
Other creatures you control enter with an additional +1/+1 counter on them for each mana from a Treasure spent to cast them.

data.name: Keen-Eared Sentry
data.oracle_text:
You have hexproof. (You can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)
Each opponent can't venture into the dungeon more than once each turn.
data.flavor_text: "You're not the first to underestimate me."

data.name: Krydle of Baldur's Gate
data.oracle_text:
Whenever Krydle deals combat damage to a player, that player loses 1 life and mills a card, then you gain 1 life and scry 1.
Whenever you attack, you may pay {2}. If you do, target creature can't be blocked this turn.

data.name: Lightfoot Rogue
data.oracle_text:
Sneak Attack — Whenever this creature attacks, roll a d20.
1—9 | This creature gains deathtouch until end of turn.
10—19 | It gets +1/+0 and gains deathtouch until end of turn.
20 | It gets +3/+0 and gains first strike and deathtouch until end of turn.

data.name: Loyal Warhound
data.oracle_text:
Vigilance
When this creature enters, if an opponent controls more lands than you, search your library for a basic Plains card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text: A paladin's steed is a celestial spirit in animal form.

data.name: Oswald Fiddlebender
data.oracle_text: Magical Tinkering — {W}, {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Search your library for an artifact card with mana value equal to 1 plus the sacrificed artifact's mana value, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Activate only as a sorcery.
data.flavor_text: "Can't see this airship crashing in the near future. Sturdy as a rock."

data.name: Pixie Guide
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Grant an Advantage — If you would roll one or more dice, instead roll that many dice plus one and ignore the lowest roll.
data.flavor_text: Pixies are well known as pranksters, but some delight in more helpful magic.

data.name: Prosperous Innkeeper
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life.

data.name: Scaled Herbalist
data.oracle_text: {T}: You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.
data.flavor_text: "I could help you, or I could eat you for lunch. I haven't decided yet."

data.name: Sepulcher Ghoul
data.oracle_text: Sacrifice another creature: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.
data.flavor_text: Ghouls devour the dead and any living creatures unwary enough to fall into their grasp.

data.name: Steadfast Paladin
data.oracle_text: Lifelink
data.flavor_text: "When I made my oath to Moradin, I left selfishness and cowardice behind. Every battle, I make that commitment anew."

data.name: Targ Nar, Demon-Fang Gnoll
data.oracle_text:
Pack tactics — Whenever Targ Nar attacks, if you attacked with creatures with total power 6 or greater this combat, attacking creatures get +1/+0 until end of turn.
{2}{R}{G}: Double Targ Nar's power and toughness until end of turn.

data.name: Trelasarra, Moon Dancer
data.oracle_text: Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Trelasarra and scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
data.flavor_text: "Eilistraee teaches us that we are not bound by the circumstances of our birth. We all may find beauty and light, if we have the courage to seek them."

data.name: Triumphant Adventurer
data.oracle_text:
Deathtouch
During your turn, this creature has first strike.
Whenever this creature attacks, venture into the dungeon. (Enter the first room or advance to the next room.)

data.name: Underdark Basilisk
data.oracle_text: Deathtouch
data.flavor_text:
"See how the statues all have chunks bitten out of them? We're dealing with a basilisk, or I'm a froghemoth."
—Larissa Kyriln, learned warlock

data.name: Werewolf Pack Leader
data.oracle_text:
Pack tactics — Whenever this creature attacks, if you attacked with creatures with total power 6 or greater this combat, draw a card.
{3}{G}: Until end of turn, this creature has base power and toughness 5/3, gains trample, and isn't a Human.

data.name: Wight
data.oracle_text:
This creature enters tapped.
Life Drain — Whenever a creature dealt damage by this creature this turn dies, create a tapped 2/2 black Zombie creature token and exile that card.
data.flavor_text: Wights want the world to resound with echoes of their own cruel hatred.

data.name: Yuan-Ti Malison
data.oracle_text:
This creature can't be blocked as long as it's attacking alone.
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, venture into the dungeon. (Enter the first room or advance to the next room.)
data.flavor_text: Silent. Slithering. Sinister.

data.name: Acererak the Archlich
data.oracle_text:
When Acererak enters, if you haven't completed Tomb of Annihilation, return Acererak to its owner's hand and venture into the dungeon.
Whenever Acererak attacks, for each opponent, you create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token unless that player sacrifices a creature of their choice.

data.name: Blink Dog
data.oracle_text:
Double strike
Teleport — {3}{W}: This creature phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until your next turn.)
data.flavor_text: Blink dogs protect the wild places of the world, driving away evil influences.

data.name: Celestial Unicorn
data.oracle_text: Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
data.flavor_text: When all hope fails, its light remains.

data.name: Circle of Dreams Druid
data.oracle_text: {T}: Add {G} for each creature you control.
data.flavor_text: The realms protected by druids of the Circle of Dreams are gleaming, fruitful places, where dream and reality blur together and the weary can find rest.

data.name: Circle of the Moon Druid
data.oracle_text: Bear Form — During your turn, this creature is a Bear with base power and toughness 4/2. (It loses all other creature types.)
data.flavor_text: Druids of the Circle of the Moon are fierce guardians of nature who haunt the deepest parts of the wilderness.

data.name: Clever Conjurer
data.oracle_text: Mage Hand — {T}: Untap target permanent not named Clever Conjurer. Activate only as a sorcery.
data.flavor_text: "I'm always happy to lend a hand!"

data.name: Cloister Gargoyle
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, venture into the dungeon. (Enter the first room or advance to the next room.)
As long as you've completed a dungeon, this creature gets +3/+0 and has flying.

data.name: Dire Wolf Prowler
data.oracle_text: {1}{G}: This creature gets +2/+2 and gains haste until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.
data.flavor_text: Large as horses, dire wolves must hunt often to satisfy their ravenous hunger. A mere human does little more than blunt their appetite.

data.name: Displacer Beast
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, venture into the dungeon. (Enter the first room or advance to the next room.)
Displacement — {3}{U}: Return this creature to its owner's hand.
data.flavor_text: The only place you can be sure it's not is wherever it appears to be.

data.name: Dragon Turtle
data.oracle_text:
Flash
Drag Below — When this creature enters, tap it and up to one target creature an opponent controls. They don't untap during their controllers' next untap steps.

data.name: Eccentric Apprentice
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, venture into the dungeon. (Enter the first room or advance to the next room.)
At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you've completed a dungeon, up to one target creature becomes a Bird with base power and toughness 1/1 and flying until end of turn.

data.name: Feywild Trickster
data.oracle_text: Whenever you roll one or more dice, create a 1/1 blue Faerie Dragon creature token with flying.
data.flavor_text: Unlike most warlocks, those who make pacts with archfey are drawn to pranks and whimsy moreso than death and darkness.

data.name: Flameskull
data.oracle_text:
Flying
This creature can't block.
Rejuvenation — When this creature dies, exile it. If you do, exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play one of those cards. (If you cast Flameskull this way, you can't play the other card, and vice versa.)

data.name: Gloom Stalker
data.oracle_text: As long as you've completed a dungeon, this creature has double strike.
data.flavor_text: "I'll make sure you never mistake a roper for a stalagmite again."

data.name: Grazilaxx, Illithid Scholar
data.oracle_text:
Whenever a creature you control becomes blocked, you may return it to its owner's hand.
Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, draw a card.
data.flavor_text: "You studied hard. How delicious!"

data.name: Guardian of Faith
data.oracle_text:
Flash
Vigilance
When this creature enters, any number of other target creatures you control phase out. (Treat them and anything attached to them as though they don't exist until their controller's next turn.)

data.name: Hama Pashar, Ruin Seeker
data.oracle_text: Room abilities of dungeons you own trigger an additional time.
data.flavor_text: "Someone took the time to carve these inscriptions. The least we can do is care enough to read them."

data.name: Hobgoblin Bandit Lord
data.oracle_text:
Other Goblins you control get +1/+1.
{R}, {T}: This creature deals damage equal to the number of Goblins that entered the battlefield under your control this turn to any target.
data.flavor_text: In a hobgoblin's view of the world, the weak owe tribute and fealty to the strong.

data.name: Hulking Bugbear
data.oracle_text: Haste
data.flavor_text: Bugbears move with surprising speed for their size and bulk, a fact that has led to the demise of many unwary adventurers.

data.name: Lurking Roper
data.oracle_text:
This creature doesn't untap during your untap step.
Whenever you gain life, untap this creature.
data.flavor_text: "You see, stalac-*tites* grow down from the ceiling, while stalag-*mites* reach—AAHHHHHHHHH—"

data.name: Minsc, Beloved Ranger
data.oracle_text:
When Minsc enters, create Boo, a legendary 1/1 red Hamster creature token with trample and haste.
{X}: Until end of turn, target creature you control has base power and toughness X/X and becomes a Giant in addition to its other types. Activate only as a sorcery.

data.oracle_text: Divine Intervention — When this creature enters, you may search your library for an enchantment card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.
data.flavor_text: Selûne guides her devotees with majestic wisdom and grace.

Vigilance

data.name: Priest of Ancient Lore
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you gain 1 life and draw a card.
data.flavor_text: "We are a product of our ancestors, the apotheosis of countless noble generations. Speak their names with reverence, and they will guide your path."

data.name: Rust Monster
data.oracle_text:
First strike
Sacrifice an artifact: This creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text:
"They don't seem scary, but then you're suddenly standing there in your underclothes without a weapon. Then everything looks like a threat."

Flash

{1}{B}, Sacrifice another creature or a Treasure: Draw a card.

data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

Xorn

Deathtouch

Flying

data.oracle_text: At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

data.name: Veteran Dungeoneer
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, venture into the dungeon. (Enter the first room or advance to the next room.)
data.flavor_text: Her tales of glory light a fire in the souls of the next generation of adventurers.

data.name: Volo, Guide to Monsters
data.oracle_text: Whenever you cast a creature spell that doesn't share a creature type with a creature you control or a creature card in your graveyard, copy that spell. (A copy of a creature spell becomes a token.)
data.flavor_text: "The beholder told me I had a good eye for details. Who was I to argue?"

data.name: Wandering Troubadour
data.oracle_text: At the beginning of your end step, if you had a land enter the battlefield under your control this turn, venture into the dungeon. (Enter the first room or advance to the next room.)
data.flavor_text: "There's a new ballad waiting to be born around every corner."

data.name: Aberrant Mind Sorcerer
data.oracle_text:
Psionic Spells — When this creature enters, choose target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard, then roll a d20.
1—9 | You may put that card on top of your library.
10—20 | Return that card to your hand.

data.name: Adult Gold Dragon
data.oracle_text: Flying, lifelink, haste
data.flavor_text: Gold dragons are the greatest of the metallic dragons in size, power, and wisdom, and often take it upon themselves to safeguard mortal communities from evils that might threaten them.

data.name: Devoted Paladin
data.oracle_text: Beacon of Hope — When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain vigilance until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: "I swore a sacred oath to protect the weak and punish those who threaten them. As long as I draw breath, I will protect you."

data.name: Drider
data.oracle_text:
Reach
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a 2/1 black Spider creature token with menace and reach.
data.flavor_text: Though their forms embody Lolth's image, driders are those unfortunate drow who have failed the Spider Queen.

data.name: Drizzt Do'Urden
data.oracle_text:
Double strike
When Drizzt enters, create Guenhwyvar, a legendary 4/1 green Cat creature token with trample.
Whenever a creature dies, if it had power greater than Drizzt's power, put a number of +1/+1 counters on Drizzt equal to the difference.

data.name: Elturgard Ranger
data.oracle_text:
Reach
When this creature enters, create a 2/2 green Wolf creature token.
data.flavor_text: Since the fall of Elturel, they've walked the Sword Coast from Tethyr to Icewind Dale, eyes always on their prey.

data.name: Froghemoth
data.oracle_text:
Trample, haste
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, exile up to that many target cards from their graveyard. Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature for each creature card exiled this way. You gain 1 life for each noncreature card exiled this way.

data.name: Herald of Hadar
data.oracle_text:
Circle of Death — {5}{B}: Roll a d20.
1—9 | Each opponent loses 2 life.
10—19 | Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
20 | Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. Create two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

data.name: Iymrith, Desert Doom
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Iymrith has ward {4} as long as it's untapped.
Whenever Iymrith deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. Then if you have fewer than three cards in hand, draw cards equal to the difference.

data.name: Loathsome Troll
data.oracle_text:
{3}{G}: Roll a d20. Activate only if this card is in your graveyard.
1—9 | Put this card on top of your library.
10—19 | Return this card to your hand.
20 | Return this card to the battlefield tapped.

data.name: Mind Flayer
data.oracle_text: Dominate Monster — When this creature enters, gain control of target creature for as long as you control this creature.
data.flavor_text: "Shed your thoughts and let my will flow through you."

data.name: Owlbear
data.oracle_text:
Trample
Keen Senses — When this creature enters, draw a card.
data.flavor_text: Many people believe a misguided wizard created the first owlbear, but others insist that these creatures have always dwelled in the Feywild.

data.name: Planar Ally
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature attacks, venture into the dungeon. (Enter the first room or advance to the next room.)
data.flavor_text: Her light touches every corner and her wings brush either wall, leaving no place for evil to lurk.

data.name: Rimeshield Frost Giant
data.oracle_text: Ward {3} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {3}.)
data.flavor_text: Frost giants carry the trophies of their greatest victories into battle, fashioned into armor of strength and savage beauty.

data.name: Swarming Goblins
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, roll a d20.
1—9 | Create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token.
10—19 | Create two of those tokens.
20 | Create three of those tokens.

data.name: Tiger-Tribe Hunter
data.oracle_text:
Trample
Pack tactics — Whenever this creature attacks, if you attacked with creatures with total power 6 or greater this combat, you may sacrifice another creature. When you do, this creature deals damage equal to the sacrificed creature's power to target creature.

data.name: Westgate Regent
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Ward—Discard a card. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player discards a card.)
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put that many +1/+1 counters on it.

data.name: Zalto, Fire Giant Duke
data.oracle_text:
Trample
Whenever Zalto is dealt damage, venture into the dungeon. (Enter the first room or advance to the next room.)
data.flavor_text: Fire giants love to fight on a large scale, and Duke Zalto is one of the greatest warmongers of his age.

data.name: Zombie Ogre
data.oracle_text: At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, venture into the dungeon. (Enter the first room or advance to the next room.)
data.flavor_text:
"On the plus side, Throg no longer thinks he's clever."
—Xanathar

data.name: Air-Cult Elemental
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whirlwind — When this creature enters, return up to one other target creature to its owner's hand.
data.flavor_text: Elemental Evil distorts the natural elements, limiting them to aspects of destruction.

data.name: Asmodeus the Archfiend
data.oracle_text:
Binding Contract — If you would draw a card, exile the top card of your library face down instead.
{B}{B}{B}: Draw seven cards.
{B}: Return all cards exiled with Asmodeus to their owner's hand and you lose that much life.

data.name: Baleful Beholder
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, choose one —
• Antimagic Cone — Each opponent sacrifices an enchantment of their choice.
• Fear Ray — Creatures you control gain menace until end of turn. (A creature with menace can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)

data.name: Earth-Cult Elemental
data.oracle_text:
Siege Monster — When this creature enters, roll a d20.
1—9 | Each player sacrifices a permanent of their choice.
10—19 | Each opponent sacrifices a permanent of their choice.
20 | Each opponent sacrifices two permanents of their choice.

data.name: Green Dragon
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Poison Breath — When this creature enters, until end of turn, whenever a creature an opponent controls is dealt damage, destroy it.
data.flavor_text: Green dragons take special pleasure in corrupting the good-hearted.

data.name: Hill Giant Herdgorger
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you gain 3 life.
data.flavor_text: A shepherd's crook is useful for cleaning bits of wool out of the teeth.

data.name: Inferno of the Star Mounts
data.oracle_text:
This spell can't be countered.
Flying, haste
{R}: Inferno of the Star Mounts gets +1/+0 until end of turn. When its power becomes 20 this way, it deals 20 damage to any target.
data.flavor_text: The ancient dragon Imvaernarhro has earned his fiery nickname.

data.name: Red Dragon
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Fire Breath — When this creature enters, it deals 4 damage to each opponent.
data.flavor_text: Red dragons consider the world and every creature in it as theirs to command.

data.name: White Dragon
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Cold Breath — When this creature enters, tap target creature an opponent controls. That creature doesn't untap during its controller's next untap step.
data.flavor_text: White dragons are unparalleled hunters, keenly focused on slaughtering their enemies.

data.name: Xanathar, Guild Kingpin
data.oracle_text: At the beginning of your upkeep, choose target opponent. Until end of turn, that player can't cast spells, you may look at the top card of their library any time, you may play the top card of their library, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast spells this way.

data.name: Black Dragon
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Acid Breath — When this creature enters, target creature an opponent controls gets -3/-3 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Black dragons revel in the collapse of humanoid kingdoms.

data.name: Blue Dragon
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Lightning Breath — When this creature enters, until your next turn, target creature an opponent controls gets -3/-0, up to one other target creature gets -2/-0, and up to one other target creature gets -1/-0.

data.name: Old Gnawbone
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, create that many Treasure tokens.
data.flavor_text: The ancient green dragon Claugiyliamatar is often seen with a mangled corpse dangling from her mouth.

data.name: Purple Worm
data.oracle_text:
This spell costs {2} less to cast if a creature died this turn.
Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)
data.flavor_text: Underground civilizations maintain magical barriers around their settlements to deter these monsters.

data.name: Tiamat
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When Tiamat enters, if you cast it, search your library for up to five Dragon cards not named Tiamat that each have different names, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text: "My children will rule over all!"

data.name: The Tarrasque
data.oracle_text:
The Tarrasque has haste and ward {10} as long as it was cast.
Whenever The Tarrasque attacks, it fights target creature defending player controls.
data.flavor_text: When it rises, nations fall.
